TEXT.source: NTU Corpus stories for Kavalan, story: KavNr-frog_syulan
TEXT.citation: Sung, L. M., Lily, I., Hsieh, F., & Lin, Z. (2008). Developing an online corpus of Formosan languages. Taiwan Journal of Linguistics, 6(2.).
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @article{sung2008developing,title={Developing an online corpus of Formosan languages.},author={Sung, Li-May and Lily, I and Hsieh, Fuhui and Lin, Zhemin and others},journal={Taiwan Journal of Linguistics},volume={6},number={2},year={2008}}

S.FORM: yau kenanem sunis aytu wasu usiq wasu qmudu tu biyat.
S.PHON: jau kənanəm sunis ajtu wasu usiq wasu qmuɮu tu βijat.
S.FORM: yau kenanem sunis aytu wasu usiq wasu qmudu tu biyat.
S.PHON: jau kənanəm sunis ajtu wasu usiq wasu qmuɮu tu βijat.
S.TRANSL: 有一個小孩和一隻狗養了一隻青蛙.
There were a child and a dog that kept a frog.

S.FORM: nani yau tmita tu biyat.
S.PHON: nani jau tmita tu βijat.
S.FORM: nani yau tmita tu biyat.
S.PHON: nani jau tmita tu βijat.
S.TRANSL: 他看青蛙.
He looked at the frog.

S.FORM: temengu maynepti sunis aytu wasu.
S.PHON: təməŋu majnəpti sunis ajtu wasu.
S.FORM: temengu maynepti sunis aytu wasu.
S.PHON: təməŋu majnəpti sunis ajtu wasu.
S.TRANSL: 結果,小孩和狗睡覺了.
And then the child and the dog fell asleep.

S.FORM: mRaRiwti biyat 'nay nizi ta buduqan.
S.PHON: mʁaʁiwti βijat ʔnaj niz~ri ta βuɮuqan.
S.FORM: mRaRiwti biyat 'nay nizi ta buduqan.
S.PHON: mʁaʁiwti βijat ʔnaj niz~ri ta βuɮuqan.
S.TRANSL: 那隻青蛙從瓶子裡跑了出來.
The frog ran out of the bottle.

S.FORM: masuat sunis 'nay aytu wasu 'nay nani.
S.PHON: masuat sunis ʔnaj ajtu wasu ʔnaj nani.
S.FORM: masuat sunis 'nay aytu wasu 'nay nani.
S.PHON: masuat sunis ʔnaj ajtu wasu ʔnaj nani.
S.TRANSL: 那個小孩和狗起床.
The child and that dog woke up.

S.FORM: maiti biyat 'nay.
S.PHON: maiti βijat ʔnaj.
S.FORM: maiti biyat 'nay.
S.PHON: maiti βijat ʔnaj.
S.TRANSL: 那個青蛙不見了.
The frog was gone.

S.FORM: nani kikiliman na sunis 'nay aytu wasu 'nay biyat.
S.PHON: nani kikiriman na sunis ʔnaj ajtu wasu ʔnaj βijat.
S.FORM: nani kikiliman na sunis 'nay aytu wasu 'nay biyat.
S.PHON: nani kikiriman na sunis ʔnaj ajtu wasu ʔnaj βijat.
S.TRANSL: 那個小孩和狗找那個青蛙.
The child and the dog looked for the frog.

S.FORM: kiliman na sunis 'nay ta kuzuan.
S.PHON: kiriman na sunis ʔnaj ta kuz~ruan.
S.FORM: kiliman na sunis 'nay ta kuzuan.
S.PHON: kiriman na sunis ʔnaj ta kuz~ruan.
S.TRANSL: 小孩找鞋子裡面.
The child searched the shoes.

S.FORM: timengu pasusuRanna na wasu 'nay uRuna pasazi ta buduqan nani.
S.PHON: timəŋu pasusuʁanna na wasu ʔnaj uʁuna pasaz~ri ta βuɮuqan nani.
S.FORM: timengu pasusuRanna na wasu 'nay uRuna pasazi ta buduqan nani.
S.PHON: timəŋu pasusuʁanna na wasu ʔnaj uʁuna pasaz~ri ta βuɮuqan nani.
S.TRANSL: 結果,那隻狗把它的頭放到瓶子裡.
And then that dog put his head into the bottle.

S.FORM: Raynguti ala 'nay uRuna tabuduqan ma.
S.PHON: ʁajŋuti ara ʔnaj uʁuna taβuɮuqan ma.
S.FORM: Raynguti ala 'nay uRuna tabuduqan ma.
S.PHON: ʁajŋuti ara ʔnaj uʁuna taβuɮuqan ma.
S.TRANSL: 牠無法把牠的頭從瓶子裡拉出來.
It couldn't pull its head out of the bottle.

S.FORM: maqawitti ta buduqan.
S.PHON: maqawitti ta βuɮuqan.
S.FORM: maqawitti ta buduqan.
S.PHON: maqawitti ta βuɮuqan.
S.TRANSL: 被卡在瓶子裡.
stuck inside the bottle.

S.FORM: nani bedungannati sunis'nay buduq 'nay kawka ma ala uRuna wasu 'nay.
S.PHON: nani βəɮuŋannati sunisʔnaj βuɮuq ʔnaj kawka ma ara uʁuna wasu ʔnaj.
S.FORM: nani bedungannati sunis'nay buduq 'nay kawka ma ala uRuna wasu 'nay.
S.PHON: nani βəɮuŋannati sunisʔnaj βuɮuq ʔnaj kawka ma ara uʁuna wasu ʔnaj.
S.TRANSL: 瓶子被那個小孩打破,他的狗的頭才被拿出來.
The bottle was broken by that child, and then the head of the dog was taken out.

S.FORM: nani matiwti sa naung kmilim wi qmeRas tu biyat 'nay sa naung.
S.PHON: nani matiwti sa nauŋ kmirim wi qməʁas tu βijat ʔnaj sa nauŋ.
S.FORM: nani matiwti sa naung kmilim wi qmeRas tu biyat 'nay sa naung.
S.PHON: nani matiwti sa nauŋ kmirim wi qməʁas tu βijat ʔnaj sa nauŋ.
S.TRANSL: 他們去山上繼續找,在山上喊那個青蛙.
They went to the mountain and kept searching, and they called to that frog in the mountain.

S.FORM: qeqeRas zana.
S.PHON: qəqəʁas z~rana.
S.FORM: qeqeRas zana.
S.PHON: qəqəʁas z~rana.
S.TRANSL: 繼續喊.
kept calling.

S.FORM: nani ma titaannati usiq 'nay eh usiq tangan tangan na na mutun.
S.PHON: nani ma titaannati usiq ʔnaj əh usiq taŋan taŋan na na mutun.
S.FORM: nani ma titaannati usiq 'nay eh usiq tangan tangan na na mutun.
S.PHON: nani ma titaannati usiq ʔnaj əh usiq taŋan taŋan na na mutun.
S.TRANSL: 他看到一個老鼠的洞.
He saw a hole of mouse.

S.FORM: yau wasu 'nay titaanna 'nay ta ta paRinan 'nay.
S.PHON: jau wasu ʔnaj titaanna ʔnaj ta ta paʁinan ʔnaj.
S.FORM: yau wasu 'nay titaanna 'nay ta ta paRinan 'nay.
S.PHON: jau wasu ʔnaj titaanna ʔnaj ta ta paʁinan ʔnaj.
S.TRANSL: 那個狗在樹那邊看.

TRANSL.notes: The dog saw (something) at a tree over there.

S.TRANSL: The dog saw at a tree over there.

S.FORM: tapaRinan 'nay e.
S.PHON: tapaʁinan ʔnaj ə.
S.FORM: tapaRinan 'nay e.
S.PHON: tapaʁinan ʔnaj ə.
S.TRANSL: 在樹那邊.
At the tree.

S.FORM: nake zeme jiang wangji le.
S.PHON: nakə z~rəmə jiaŋ waŋji rə.
S.FORM: nake zeme jiang wangji le.
S.PHON: nakə z~rəmə jiaŋ waŋji rə.
S.TRANSL: 那個怎麼講忘記了.
I forget how to say that.

S.FORM: mai mai biyat 'nay pakalaanna.
S.PHON: mai mai βijat ʔnaj pakaraanna.
S.FORM: mai mai biyat 'nay pakalaanna.
S.PHON: mai mai βijat ʔnaj pakaraanna.
S.TRANSL: 沒有找到青蛙.
The frog was not found.

S.FORM: nani mzaqisti sunis 'nay pasazui ta paRinan.
S.PHON: nani mz~raqisti sunis ʔnaj pasaz~rui ta paʁinan.
S.FORM: nani mzaqisti sunis 'nay pasazui ta paRinan.
S.PHON: nani mz~raqisti sunis ʔnaj pasaz~rui ta paʁinan.
S.TRANSL: 那個小孩爬上那棵樹.
The child climbed up the tree.

S.FORM: yau tangan na paRin.
S.PHON: jau taŋan na paʁin.
S.FORM: yau tangan na paRin.
S.PHON: jau taŋan na paʁin.
S.TRANSL: 那邊有樹的洞.
There was a tree hole.

S.FORM: mai qaya biyat 'nay.
S.PHON: mai qaja βijat ʔnaj.
S.FORM: mai qaya biyat 'nay.
S.PHON: mai qaja βijat ʔnaj.
S.TRANSL: 那隻青蛙也不在.
The frog was not there, either.

S.FORM: temengu tateRaq na paRin yau e adam.
S.PHON: təməŋu tatəʁaq na paʁin jau ə aɮam.
S.FORM: temengu tateRaq na paRin yau e adam.
S.PHON: təməŋu tatəʁaq na paʁin jau ə aɮam.
S.TRANSL: 然後,在樹裡面有一隻鳥.
And then, there was a bird inside the tree.

S.FORM: muRetut sunis 'nay tmibuqti tapaRinan nizi tapaRinan sunis 'nay.
S.PHON: muʁətut sunis ʔnaj tmiβuqti tapaʁinan niz~ri tapaʁinan sunis ʔnaj.
S.FORM: muRetut sunis 'nay tmibuqti tapaRinan nizi tapaRinan sunis 'nay.
S.PHON: muʁətut sunis ʔnaj tmiβuqti tapaʁinan niz~ri tapaʁinan sunis ʔnaj.
S.TRANSL: 那個小孩被嚇到然後從樹上掉下來.
The child was frightened and fell off the tree.

S.FORM: temengu e tanuzanna penay 'nay wasu 'nay wi tanuzanna.
S.PHON: təməŋu ə tanuz~ranna pənaj ʔnaj wasu ʔnaj wi tanuz~ranna.
S.FORM: temengu e tanuzanna penay 'nay wasu 'nay wi tanuzanna.
S.PHON: təməŋu ə tanuz~ranna pənaj ʔnaj wasu ʔnaj wi tanuz~ranna.
S.TRANSL: 然後,蜜峰繼續追那個狗.
And then, the bees continued chasing the dog.

S.FORM: wi mRaRiw wasu 'nay.
S.PHON: wi mʁaʁiw wasu ʔnaj.
S.FORM: wi mRaRiw wasu 'nay.
S.PHON: wi mʁaʁiw wasu ʔnaj.
S.TRANSL: 那個狗繼續跑.
The dog kept running.

S.FORM: adam 'nay nani tanuzan na sunis'nay qaya.
S.PHON: aɮam ʔnaj nani tanuz~ran na sunisʔnaj qaja.
S.FORM: adam 'nay nani tanuzan na sunis'nay qaya.
S.PHON: aɮam ʔnaj nani tanuz~ran na sunisʔnaj qaja.
S.TRANSL: 那個鳥繼續追那個小孩.
The bird continued chasing that child.

S.FORM: mzaqisti tu betu sunis 'nay.
S.PHON: mz~raqisti tu βətu sunis ʔnaj.
S.FORM: mzaqisti tu betu sunis 'nay.
S.PHON: mz~raqisti tu βətu sunis ʔnaj.
S.TRANSL: 那個小孩也爬到石頭上.
The child also climbed up to the rock.

S.FORM: temengu tatuRuz na betu yau 'nay sizi.
S.PHON: təməŋu tatuʁuz~r na βətu jau ʔnaj siz~ri.
S.FORM: temengu tatuRuz na betu yau 'nay sizi.
S.PHON: təməŋu tatuʁuz~r na βətu jau ʔnaj siz~ri.
S.TRANSL: 結果,有一隻羊在石頭後面.
And then, there was a goat behind the rock.

S.FORM: qapaR zana sunis 'nay 'nay si waki na sizi 'nay.
S.PHON: qapaʁ z~rana sunis ʔnaj ʔnaj si waki na siz~ri ʔnaj.
S.FORM: qapaR zana sunis 'nay 'nay si waki na sizi 'nay.
S.PHON: qapaʁ z~rana sunis ʔnaj ʔnaj si waki na siz~ri ʔnaj.
S.TRANSL: 那個小孩抓著它,那個羊的角.
The child held it, the horn of the goat.

S.FORM: tayan qmeRas tu kmilim tu biyatna nani.
S.PHON: tajan qməʁas tu kmirim tu βijatna nani.
S.FORM: tayan qmeRas tu kmilim tu biyatna nani.
S.PHON: tajan qməʁas tu kmirim tu βijatna nani.
S.TRANSL: 在那邊喊他的青蛙.
He called and looked for his frog there.

S.FORM: Raynguanna tu sizi 'nay.
S.PHON: ʁajŋuanna tu siz~ri ʔnaj.
S.FORM: Raynguanna tu sizi 'nay.
S.PHON: ʁajŋuanna tu siz~ri ʔnaj.
S.TRANSL: 他不知道那個羊在那裡.
He didn't know that the goat was there.

S.FORM: temengu masuat sizi 'nay nani.
S.PHON: təməŋu masuat siz~ri ʔnaj nani.
S.FORM: temengu masuat sizi 'nay nani.
S.PHON: təməŋu masuat siz~ri ʔnaj nani.
S.TRANSL: 結果,羊起來.
And then, the goat got up.

S.FORM: baksiwanna ta iRebengan.
S.PHON: βaksiwanna ta iʁəβəŋan.
S.FORM: baksiwanna ta iRebengan.
S.PHON: βaksiwanna ta iʁəβəŋan.
S.TRANSL: 然後,它把他丟到深的河裡面.
It threw him into the deep river.

S.FORM: 'nay iRuR aytu wasu 'nay nizanna kinawsa baksiw.
S.PHON: ʔnaj iʁuʁ ajtu wasu ʔnaj niz~ranna kinawsa βaksiw.
S.FORM: 'nay iRuR aytu wasu 'nay nizanna kinawsa baksiw.
S.PHON: ʔnaj iʁuʁ ajtu wasu ʔnaj niz~ranna kinawsa βaksiw.
S.TRANSL: 它丟那個狗和全部.他丟兩個.
It threw them, both the dog and the child.

S.FORM: nani mnanguyti sunis 'nay aytu wasu 'nay pasa qazqaz.
S.PHON: nani mnaŋujti sunis ʔnaj ajtu wasu ʔnaj pasa qaz~rqaz~r.
S.FORM: nani mnanguyti sunis 'nay aytu wasu 'nay pasa qazqaz.
S.PHON: nani mnaŋujti sunis ʔnaj ajtu wasu ʔnaj pasa qaz~rqaz~r.
S.TRANSL: 那個小孩和狗游往河岸.
The child and the dog swam to the shore.

S.FORM: timenguti ta na tatuRuz na paRin yau.
S.PHON: timəŋuti ta na tatuʁuz~r na paʁin jau.
S.FORM: timenguti ta na tatuRuz na paRin yau.
S.PHON: timəŋuti ta na tatuʁuz~r na paʁin jau.
S.TRANSL: 結果,在樹的後面有…
And then, at the back of the tree there were...

S.FORM: qalimetka qalimetka zin na sunis 'nay tu wasu 'nay.
S.PHON: qarimətka qarimətka z~rin na sunis ʔnaj tu wasu ʔnaj.
S.FORM: qalimetka qalimetka zin na sunis 'nay tu wasu 'nay.
S.PHON: qarimətka qarimətka z~rin na sunis ʔnaj tu wasu ʔnaj.
S.TRANSL: 那個小孩對著狗說:「安靜!安靜!」.
The child said to the dog, 'Be quiet! Be quiet!'

S.FORM: yau 'nay biyat 'nay tatuRus na paRin.
S.PHON: jau ʔnaj βijat ʔnaj tatuʁus na paʁin.
S.FORM: yau 'nay biyat 'nay tatuRus na paRin.
S.PHON: jau ʔnaj βijat ʔnaj tatuʁus na paʁin.
S.TRANSL: 那隻青蛙在樹的後面.
Behind the tree, there was the frog.

S.FORM: e nanapaw kinawsa yau upitu sunis na biyat 'nay.
S.PHON: ə nanapaw kinawsa jau upitu sunis na βijat ʔnaj.
S.FORM: e nanapaw kinawsa yau upitu sunis na biyat 'nay.
S.PHON: ə nanapaw kinawsa jau upitu sunis na βijat ʔnaj.
S.TRANSL: 那裡有一對夫婦和青蛙的七個小孩.
There were husband and wife and seven children of frogs.

S.FORM: nani titaanna 'nay nanapaw tam tinana tamana na biyat 'nay.
S.PHON: nani titaanna ʔnaj nanapaw tam tinana tamana na βijat ʔnaj.
S.FORM: nani titaanna 'nay nanapaw tam tinana tamana na biyat 'nay.
S.PHON: nani titaanna ʔnaj nanapaw tam tinana tamana na βijat ʔnaj.
S.TRANSL: 他看到夫婦,青蛙的媽媽和爸爸.
He saw the husband and wife,… the mother and the father of the frogs.

S.FORM: sunis zau ngidiku tu qudu tu usiq biyat zinna titaanna mlizaq tu biyat nani.
S.PHON: sunis z~rau ŋiɮiku tu quɮu tu usiq βijat z~rinna titaanna mriz~raq tu βijat nani.
S.FORM: sunis zau ngidiku tu qudu tu usiq biyat zinna titaanna mlizaq tu biyat nani.
S.PHON: sunis z~rau ŋiɮiku tu quɮu tu usiq βijat z~rinna titaanna mriz~raq tu βijat nani.
S.TRANSL: 那個小孩想:「我要一隻青蛙」.他看到而且喜歡那個青蛙.
'I want to keep one frog,' thought the child. He saw and liked the frog.

S.FORM: bulaannati tamana tinana tu usiq tu sunis 'nay sapatananansu zinna.
S.PHON: βuraannati tamana tinana tu usiq tu sunis ʔnaj sapatananansu z~rinna.
S.FORM: bulaannati tamana tinana tu usiq tu sunis 'nay sapatananansu zinna.
S.PHON: βuraannati tamana tinana tu usiq tu sunis ʔnaj sapatananansu z~rinna.
S.TRANSL: 青蛙爸爸和媽媽把一隻青蛙送給那小孩:「給你帶回家.」
The father and mother gave one frog to that child. 'One for you to bring home.'

S.FORM: nani wanay xiexieni wanay zin na tina na sunis 'nay tu tama tamana tinana.
S.PHON: nani wanaj *iə*iəni wanaj z~rin na tina na sunis ʔnaj tu tama tamana tinana.
S.FORM: nani wanay xiexieni wanay zin na tina na sunis 'nay tu tama tamana tinana.
S.PHON: nani wanaj *iə*iəni wanaj z~rin na tina na sunis ʔnaj tu tama tamana tinana.
S.TRANSL: 「謝謝你.」那個小孩謝謝它的爸爸和媽媽.
'Thank you,' the child said to its father and mother.
